cell.desc: You awake inside a dank, moss-covered prison cell. Heavy iron bars block the exit leading north.

hallway.desc: A long cobblestone corridor. Torchlight flickers against the walls. To the south is your old cell. To the west is an abandoned armory. A massive steel door bars passage to the east.

rusty-key.msg: You jam the rusty-key into the door lock and turn it with a heavy click. The massive steel door swings open to the east!

armory.desc: Rusted weapon racks line the walls. Dust settles over broken shields. The hallway lies back to the east.

courtyard.desc: Cool night air hits your face. The starlit night sky stretches above you. You have broken free from the depths! You win!
